allow: Bash(node -e "process.stdin.resume\(\); let d=''''''''; process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\).result; console.log\(''''Block:'''', parseInt\(r.blockNumber,16\)\); console.log\(''''To:'''', r.to\); console.log\(''''Status:'''', r.status\); console.log\(''''Logs:''''\); r.logs.forEach\(\(l,i\)=>{console.log\(''''  Log'''',i,''''{''''\); console.log\(''''    address:'''', l.address\); console.log\(''''    topics:'''', JSON.stringify\(l.topics\)\); console.log\(''''    data:'''', l.data.slice\(0,66\)+''''...''''\); console.log\(''''  }''''\);}\)}\)")
